name: Cold Peach Strawberry Soup
recipeIngredient: Sliced peeled peach or nectarine, sliced
1 (8 oz) carton Peach or strawberry yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove lemon slices and mint sprigs.
2. In a food processor, combine all ingredients except lemon slices and mint.
3. Process until smooth.
4. Pour into a medium bowl and cover.
5. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours or until thoroughly chilled.
6. Spoon soup into bowls; garnish with lemon slices and mint if desired.
7. Makes 5 servings (About 90 calories per half-cup)
